prompt:
nul-grit-12-sprint: A raw vintage 35mm film snapshot of a wiry Latino man in his early 30s exploding out of sprint starting blocks on a weathered outdoor track at first light, body driving forward low and hard, front foot still on the block. Long low golden dawn sun, deep blue pre-dawn shade, a flare grazing the frame edge. EXTREME slow-shutter motion blur as if a ~1/15s exposure during fast movement: the subject and the ENTIRE frame are smeared into long directional streaks with ghosted, doubled edges, dissolving toward abstraction exactly like the reference — only a small core of the subject stays semi-legible while everything else melts into motion. The blur is aggressive, painterly and heavy, the dominant feature of the image.

This must look like a REAL, raw vintage 35mm FILM photograph shot handheld on a film SLR and scanned straight from the negative — Cinestill 800T / pushed Portra character. HEAVY organic film grain. SOFT film focus — NOTHING is tack-sharp, crisp, or clean. Gentle halation and bloom around the highlights. Muted, desaturated, slightly faded film color science — NOT vivid, NOT HDR, NOT clean digital. Raw, candid, unposed, with imperfect off-kilter amateur framing — close and partially cropped, caught in the moment, not lit by a crew. Natural imperfect skin and real texture, no plastic AI smoothness. It must NOT look like a polished commercial photo, a cinematic render, or an AI image. Use the reference image ONLY as a film-look anchor — match its exact grain, grade, exposure, softness and motion-blur character — but IGNORE the reference's scene, people, activity and composition completely; render the NEW scene described below in that film look.

Match the heavy grain, golden muted grade, soft focus, halation and the aggressive painterly directional motion-blur of the reference cyclist image — but render THIS sprinter scene, not a cyclist.

A raw dim concrete bathhouse, one cold window-shaft of light cutting through rising steam, deep shadow swallowing the rest. nul-grit-14-chess: A raw vintage 35mm film snapshot, candid and close, of an East Asian man in his early 70s, lean with silver hair and deeply lined hands, hovering two fingers over a knight he is lifting a centimetre off a worn wooden chessboard, eyes locked hard on the board. A dim cluttered study, a single low tungsten lamp raking warm light across the board, the room falling into muted cool shadow. Captured as a candid handheld still — no heavy motion blur — but keep the soft film focus, heavy grain, halation and imperfect candid framing; it is gentle and slightly soft, never crisp, sharp, or clean.

nul-grit-17-couple: A raw vintage 35mm film snapshot, candid and intimate, of a couple at dawn standing close in a bedroom, eyes gently closed, foreheads softly pressed together in a shared breath, his hand resting calmly on the back of her neck. She is a lean East Asian woman in her mid-30s in oatmeal loungewear with a lavender shawl; he is a lean Black man in his 40s in a charcoal henley. Just after sunrise by a window, warm light raking their faces, the room behind in muted cool shadow. Fully clothed, tender, emotional connection — nothing explicit. Captured as a candid handheld still — no heavy motion blur — but keep the soft film focus, heavy grain, halation and imperfect candid framing; it is gentle and slightly soft, never crisp, sharp, or clean.
